name: Proxy not working / dead proxy

actions.text: I’m sorry to hear that. Let me look up your order — could you share your Flutterwave transaction reference (tx_ref) so I can check your proxy status and run a health check?

notes: Charon asks for the tx_ref. When the customer provides it, the LLM calls lookup_order to check status and credentials. If the order is fulfilled and credentials exist, Charon advises on troubleshooting steps. If credentials are expired or revoked, Charon explains and offers to escalate for a ban claim or refund. If the order is not found, Charon asks for the tx_ref again.
